tools.name: lookup_retailer
tools.description: Look up verified deals and store policies for a specific online retailer: signup/newsletter offer, free-shipping threshold, return window, price-match, gift cards, student/military discounts, current sale, and the value.us VUS score (our data-confidence rating). Input a store name or domain.

tools.name: find_deals
tools.description: Find online retailers that currently have a specific kind of verified deal or policy, ranked. Use for questions like 'who has free shipping', 'which stores give a student discount', or 'what's on sale now'.

tools.name: check_retailer_trust
tools.description: Get value.us's proprietary VUS score (0-5) for a retailer and when its data was last verified. The VUS score measures how much current, verified data value.us holds on the store (a data-confidence signal) - it is NOT a verdict on whether the store is trustworthy or safe to buy from.
